seoTitle: Ocean Beach vs Ocean Reef — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ocean Beach and Ocean Reef. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ocean Beach vs Ocean Reef: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ocean Beach and Ocean Reef.
heading: Ocean Beach vs Ocean Reef — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ocean Beach, Western Australia and Ocean Reef, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ocean Reef has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Ocean Beach (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ocean Beach or Ocean Reef safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ocean Beach has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Ocean Reef scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ocean Beach scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Ocean Reef scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ocean Beach or Ocean Reef?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ocean Reef has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
